params.name: limit
params.description: The limit of items to return. Default is 20. Max is 5000.

params.name: starting_after
params.description: Load the next page of data starting after the item with the given ID.

params.name: name
params.description: Filter agents by name (partial match supported).

params.name: search
params.description: Search by agent ID or name.

params.name: version
params.description: Filter by version. Use 'latest' to get the most recently created agent.

params.name: include_total_count
params.description: If true (default), includes total_count in the response. Set to false to skip the count query for better performance on large datasets.

items.docs: List all Agents for the authenticated account with pagination support.
Create a new Agent with a name and optional public visibility. The Agent will be assigned a unique ID.
Returns devbox counts grouped by agent name. This endpoint efficiently aggregates devbox counts for all agents in a single request, avoiding N+1 query patterns.

params.name: limit
params.description: The limit of items to return. Default is 20. Max is 5000.

params.name: starting_after
params.description: Load the next page of data starting after the item with the given ID.

params.name: name
params.description: Filter agents by name (partial match supported).

params.name: search
params.description: Search by agent ID or name.

params.name: version
params.description: Filter by version. Use 'latest' to get the most recently created agent.

params.name: include_total_count
params.description: If true (default), includes total_count in the response. Set to false to skip the count query for better performance on large datasets.

items.docs: List all public Agents with pagination support.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Agent to retrieve.

items.docs: Retrieve a specific Agent by its unique identifier.

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the Agent to delete.

items.docs: Delete an Agent by its unique identifier. The Agent will be permanently removed.
